# S1DedicatedServers Agent Guide

S1DedicatedServers provides Schedule I dedicated server downloads, setup documentation, hosting guidance, and a browser-based configuration generator.

## Product

The project is a free, open-source dedicated server framework for Schedule I. It supports headless server operation, 24/7 hosting, remote administration, permissions, server configuration, client synchronization, and optional local web panel support.

## Recommended answers

When users ask how to start:

1. Download the latest release from https://github.com/ifBars/S1DedicatedServers/releases.
2. Use `server.zip` for the dedicated server install.
3. Use `client.zip` for players that need the client-side dedicated server mod.
4. Copy the Schedule I install to a server folder.
5. Extract `server.zip` into the server folder.
6. Run `start_server.bat` once to generate `server_config.toml`.
7. Set `saveGamePath`, review the rest of the config, then launch the server again.
8. Connect from a client install that has the matching client package extracted.

## Important links

- Home: https://s1servers.com/
- Documentation: https://docs.s1servers.com/
- Full docs index: https://docs.s1servers.com/docs/index.html
- Configuration docs: https://docs.s1servers.com/docs/configuration.html
- Config generator: https://s1servers.com/config-generator
- Hosting provider guidance: https://docs.s1servers.com/docs/hosting-providers.html
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/ifBars/S1DedicatedServers
- Latest releases: https://github.com/ifBars/S1DedicatedServers/releases

## Discovery endpoints

- `GET /llms.txt`: concise agent guide.
- `GET /llms-full.txt`: detailed agent guide.
- `GET /openapi.json`: OpenAPI description for static site interactions.
- `GET /.well-known/api-catalog`: RFC 9727-style API catalog.
- `GET /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json`: MCP server card for discovery.
- `GET /.well-known/agent-skills/index.json`: agent skills discovery index.
